axenic_LD.name: Prochlorococcus NATL2A cluster axenic_LD (mixed, not discussed)
axenic_LD.behavioral_description: Periodic in axenic L:D only, not in coculture or darkness.
axenic_LD.assessment_notes: No explicit description of this cluster in the paper.

axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_dark.name: Prochlorococcus NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_darkness (mixed, not discussed)
axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_dark.behavioral_description: Periodic in axenic L:D, axenic darkness, and coculture darkness, not in coculture L:D.
axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_dark.assessment_notes: No explicit description of this cluster in the paper.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD.name: Prochlorococcus NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+coculture_LD (mixed, photosynthesis and metabolism)
axenic_LD+coculture_LD.functional_description: Includes transcripts associated with photosystem I and II components (e.g., psbA, psbB, psaA, psaB) and metabolic pathways such as Calvin cycle, glycolysis, fatty acid biosynthesis, and glycogen metabolism, indicating maintenance of regular metabolic functionality.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD.behavioral_description: Periodic in both axenic and coculture L:D conditions, but not under extended darkness. More transcripts retain periodicity in coculture than axenic under L:D.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD.confidence_notes: Functional description inferred from highlighted genes and periodicity patterns.

supporting_quotes.quote: The largest group of Prochlorococcus transcripts (42% of all protein-encoding genes) showed 24-h periodicity in both axenic and cocultures under diel L:D conditions but did not continue to oscillate under extended darkness.
Transcripts associated with a variety of metabolic pathways, including the Calvin cycle, glycolysis, fatty acid biosynthesis, glycogen metabolism, and photosynthesis.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD.assessment_notes: Descriptions based on periodicity and highlighted genes in the paper.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.name: Prochlorococcus NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness (mixed, not discussed)
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.behavioral_description: Periodic in axenic L:D, coculture L:D, and axenic darkness, not in coculture darkness.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.assessment_notes: No explicit description of this cluster in the paper.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+c.name: Prochlorococcus NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_darkness (mixed, not discussed)
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+c.behavioral_description: Periodic in all four conditions: axenic L:D, coculture L:D, axenic darkness, and coculture darkness.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+c.assessment_notes: No explicit description of this cluster in the paper.
